; --- globals ---
@.fmt.concat.sd = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"%s%d\00", align 1
@.fmt.concat.ss = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"%s%s\00", align 1
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [7 x i8] c" (age \00", align 1
@.str.1 = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c") - \00", align 1
@.str.2 = private unnamed_addr constant [7 x i8] c"active\00", align 1
@.str.3 = private unnamed_addr constant [9 x i8] c"inactive\00", align 1
@.str.4 = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"Alice\00", align 1
@.str.5 = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"Bob\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)
declare i32 @snprintf(ptr, i32, ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_formatEntry
define ptr @InputKt_formatEntry(ptr %arg0, i32 %arg1, i32 %arg2) {
entry:
  %merge_11 = alloca ptr
  %t0 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t0, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %arg0, ptr @.str.0)
  %t2 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t2, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.sd, ptr %t0, i32 %arg1)
  %t4 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t4, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t2, ptr @.str.1)
  %t6 = trunc i32 %arg2 to i1
  br i1 %t6, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  store ptr @.str.2, ptr %merge_11
  br label %bb3
bb2:
  store ptr @.str.3, ptr %merge_11
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  %t7 = load ptr, ptr %merge_11
  %t8 = alloca [256 x i8]
  call i32 (ptr, i32, ptr, ...) @snprintf(ptr %t8, i32 256, ptr @.fmt.concat.ss, ptr %t4, ptr %t7)
  ret ptr %t8
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 30
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1
  %t2 = call ptr @InputKt_formatEntry(ptr @.str.4, i32 %t0, i32 %t1)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t2)
  %t4 = add i32 0, 25
  %t5 = add i32 0, 0
  %t6 = call ptr @InputKt_formatEntry(ptr @.str.5, i32 %t4, i32 %t5)
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t6)
  ret i32 0
}
